description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. This perfume explores spring and blossoming of femininity. Product Details Rasasi Feelings is a perfume spray for women with a fresh floral fragrance. Top notes are bergamot, lemon and rose. The middle notes are lavender and jasmine. The base notes are vanilla, amber, sandalwood and musk. This perfume comes in a stylish and curvy transparent flask. Size 60 ml
